# AutoMem

AutoMem is an open-source persistent memory layer for AI agents and MCP-compatible tools.

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://automem.ai/
- Documentation: https://automem.ai/docs/
- Quick start: https://automem.ai/docs/getting-started/quick-start/
- Docker setup: https://automem.ai/docs/getting-started/docker/
- Configuration: https://automem.ai/docs/reference/configuration/
- Authentication: https://automem.ai/docs/reference/authentication/
- API reference: https://automem.ai/docs/reference/api/direct-vs-mcp/
- Health and analytics: https://automem.ai/docs/reference/api/health/
- Operations health: https://automem.ai/docs/operations/health/

## Platform Guides

- Claude Desktop: https://automem.ai/docs/platforms/claude-desktop/
- Claude Code: https://automem.ai/docs/platforms/claude-code/
- Cursor IDE: https://automem.ai/docs/platforms/cursor/
- OpenAI Codex: https://automem.ai/docs/platforms/codex/
- ChatGPT: https://automem.ai/docs/platforms/chatgpt/
- GitHub Copilot: https://automem.ai/docs/platforms/github-copilot/
- ElevenLabs Agents: https://automem.ai/docs/platforms/elevenlabs/
- OpenClaw: https://automem.ai/docs/platforms/openclaw/
- Google AntiGravity: https://automem.ai/docs/platforms/antigravity/

## Source Repositories

- AutoMem server: https://github.com/verygoodplugins/automem
- MCP client and CLI: https://github.com/verygoodplugins/mcp-automem
- Graph viewer: https://github.com/verygoodplugins/automem-graph-viewer

## Notes For Agents

automem.ai is the marketing and documentation origin. Use deployment-specific
AutoMem API URLs and credentials from the user's own AutoMem installation.
